variants.name: 喧闹鬼
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。如果你杀死了一名中毒的玩家，会有额外一名玩家死亡。如果你杀死了一名外来者，与他邻近的一名镇民玩家中毒且你会得知他是谁。[+1外来者]
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the Poltergeist. They will choose a player - mark that player with the Poltergeist's DEAD reminder token: They die. If they were poisoned, mark another poisoned player with the Poltergeist's DEAD reminder token: They die. If the Poltergeist kills an Outsider, nod your head "yes" at them. Then, put the Poltergeist to sleep.
